caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" and a circular logo is seated in a studio setting. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone, speaking while looking slightly to his left. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring stars and the repeated phrase "EMPIRE HUSTLE." To his right, a red and black sign reads "BOSS TALK 101," and a logo in the bottom left corner says "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST." As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking, slightly shifting his head and facial expressions, while his posture remains mostly still. He wears a gold chain necklace that is visible against his shirt. The lighting is bright and consistent throughout the scene, focusing on the man as he engages in a conversation.
